{{Infobox group
| name = Sha family
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Sha family is a ruling lineage that governs the [[Ninecloud]] people. The family has maintained its authority through the use of illusions, specifically projecting a false image of their long-reigning queen, [[Sha Leiala]], to convince the public she remains healthy and powerful. In reality, Leiala's [[life]] force was compromised following a battle with plague-spirits, leading to an early passing of her inheritance. The family has recently prepared for a transition of power by spreading rumors that Leiala intends to abdicate in favor of her daughter, [[Sha Miara]]. While [[Miara]] publicly presents herself as an [[Underlady]] from a distant royal branch, she is believed by some to be the [[Monarch]]'s daughter due to her command over [[royal madra]]. The Sha family possesses significant knowledge regarding the location of the ancient [[labyrinth]] on the [[Ninecloud continent]] and maintains a close connection to the faith of Emriss.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sha family]] knows the true identity of the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Sha family]] would have ward keys to the [[Ninecloud Court]] [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sha family]] is spreading rumors about [[Sha Leiala]]'s abdication.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sha family]] has a good understanding of the ancient maze's location.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Sha family]] is the ruling family of the [[Ninecloud continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Most of the fighters in the [[Ninecloud Court]] come from the [[Sha family]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
